{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Moonfall’s shields
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]]'s shields are a type of shield used for protection.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
